overview: A comprehensive candlestick pattern reference library by NK Prajapati. Features 30+ patterns with visual diagrams, educational descriptions, market psychology explanations, and trading guidance — fully searchable and filterable for traders at every level.
features: 30+ candlestick pattern library with visual diagrams
Search by pattern name or description
Filter by bullish, bearish, reversal, continuation, and indecision categories
Pattern detail pages with formation, psychology, and trading strategy
Responsive design for desktop and mobile
Public reference site — no login required
